query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'consignados' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%srcc%' OR TABLE_NAME = 'consignados' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%restricao%' OR TABLE_NAME = 'consignados' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%SRCC%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'consignados' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%srcc%' OR TABLE_NAME = 'consignados' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%restricao%' OR TABLE_NAME = 'consignados' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%SRCC%';
